# PSX Stock Analyzer

> Free Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) analysis tool that explains stocks in plain English for beginner Pakistani investors.

## About
PSX Stock Analyzer is a free, web-based tool that helps non-finance Pakistani investors understand stocks listed on the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX). Users paste a PSX company URL and get a jargon-free analysis covering financials, dividends, valuation, risk, and Shariah compliance — all in plain English. No sign-up, no fees, no financial advice.

## Key Features
- Analyze any PSX-listed company with a plain English breakdown of P/E ratio, profit margin, EPS growth, and dividend history
- Compare two PSX stocks head-to-head across 7 key metrics with a clear winner declaration
- Shariah compliance badge showing KMI All Shares Islamic index status
- Revenue and profit bar charts with annual and quarterly financial statement data
- 52-week price range, buyer/seller strength, and circuit breaker info
- Risk level assessment and plain-language business verdict
- Educational formulas section explaining Book Value, Dividend Yield, P/E Ratio, and more
- Roman Urdu toggle for glossary terms

## Data Sources
- PSX Data Portal (dps.psx.com.pk) — live stock prices, company profiles, trading data, dividends
- Yahoo Finance — financial statements (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow), price history

## Target Users
- Beginner Pakistani investors new to the stock market
- Non-finance professionals who want to understand PSX stocks without jargon
- Retail investors comparing KSE-100 listed companies
- Muslims seeking Shariah-compliant investment information on PSX
